description_long: This house features a simple, boxy structure with a flat roof and a smaller, raised section on top, suggesting a modern utilitarian design. The exterior is clad in a uniform gray stone or concrete texture, giving it a sturdy, industrial appearance. Windows are small, square, and symmetrically placed on the lower level, with some metallic grilles or vents visible on the upper and lower sections. The base of the house is accented with a lighter, brick-like trim, adding a subtle contrast to the otherwise monochromatic facade. The main entryway is a plain, rectangular door located on one side, accompanied by a vent and two windows. The overall design is minimalistic, with little ornamentation and a focus on function over form.
description: A modern, boxy house with a flat roof, gray stone exterior, and small square windows. The design is minimalistic and utilitarian, with subtle brick accents and metallic vents.
description_view_0: This view shows two small square windows and a section of brick trim at the base, with the flat roof and raised upper section clearly visible.
description_view_1: The back view reveals a single window and a vent on the lower section, with the upper section overhanging slightly.
description_view_2: This side view mirrors the opposite side, displaying two small windows and the brick base, with the raised roof section offset to one side.
description_view_3: The front view features the main entry door, two windows, and a vent, with the upper section displaying a large metallic grille.
attribute_entryway_design: Plain rectangular door with no steps or porch, minimal decorative elements, and a vent adjacent to the entry.
